Daily Digest Mar 4, 2026
1
 Breaking: Major infrastructure bill passes committee vote
The proposal includes funding for bridges, broadband, and public transit over 10 years.
2
 Mars rover captures high-resolution image of ancient riverbed
Scientists say the formation provides strongest evidence yet for sustained water flow.
Live music comeback: ticket sales exceed pre-pandemic levels
Industry data shows a 23% increase over 2019 figures globally.
